text: Last class you shared your opinion in a meeting.
Today you set up a meeting and confirm the time.

I am meeting the team on Monday.
Tom is flying to Basel on Wednesday.
Why don't we meet on Monday afternoon?
Shall we set up a call this week?
Hi Aline. We need to set up a planning meeting. Shall we meet next week?
Sure. Let me check my calendar. On Wednesday you are flying to Basel, right?
Yes. So Wednesday does not work. Why don't we meet on Monday afternoon?
Monday morning I am presenting the budget, but I am free in the afternoon. Three o'clock is a good slot.
Perfect. Let's confirm Monday at three. If something comes up, we can reschedule.
Great. I am sending a calendar invite now, and I will set up the meeting room.
I am free in the afternoon. Three is a good slot.
Let's confirm Monday at three.
If something comes up, we can reschedule.

Hi Aline, this is Tom. I am calling about next week. We need to set up a planning meeting for the new project. I am flying to the Basel office on Wednesday, so Wednesday does not work for me. On Monday I am meeting the marketing team in the morning, but I am free in the afternoon. On Tuesday I have a doctor's appointment at noon. So my best slot is Monday afternoon, around three o'clock. Why don't we get together then? If that is not good for you, we can reschedule. Please confirm when you can. Thanks, and talk soon.

This is a quick voice note to plan my week before I reply to Tom. Let me check my calendar. On Monday morning I am presenting the budget, so I am busy until lunch. In the afternoon I am free, so Monday at three works well for me. On Tuesday I am working from home, and on Thursday I am traveling to the client. I will confirm Monday afternoon with Tom and set up the meeting room. If something comes up, I can postpone it to Friday. My goal is to arrange one clear time that works for both of us, and to send a calendar invite today.

First, Tom calls to set up a planning meeting for the new project. Then he explains that he is flying to Basel on Wednesday, so that day does not work. After that, he suggests Monday afternoon at three o'clock. Next, Aline checks her calendar and confirms that Monday works for her. Finally, she sends a calendar invite and books the meeting room.
